payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Arched-top white-painted window with double-hung frame and closed horizontal slatted blinds, beige fabric valance over the arch, faint frosted/smudged patch on the lower blind and minor paint chipping on left trim; outdoor driveway and foliage seen through the slats — window appears about 2.5 m from the camera.
attributes: minor paint chipping on left trim

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"arched-top white window with blinds","long_description":"Arched-top white-painted window with double-hung frame and closed horizontal slatted blinds, beige fabric valance over the arch, faint frosted/smudged patch on the lower blind and minor paint chipping on left trim; outdoor driveway and foliage seen through the slats — window appears about 2.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["white painted frame","horizontal slatted blinds","arched beige valance","double-hung sashes","frosty/smudged area on blind","minor paint chipping on left trim","outdoor view visible through slats"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
